follow_on_dependencies.title: ci-preview execution remains blocked until publication parity recovers
follow_on_dependencies.bounded_seam: The governed runner already emits blocked settlements for stale non-production tuples. A later release/publication recovery task can switch the CI rehearsal target from local seeded tuples to exact ci-preview tuples without changing plan or settlement semantics.

records.title: Local seeded additive migration passes dual-read and observation
records.summary: The local seeded tuple proves expand-migrate-contract, dual-read comparison, and contractive cutover without blocking patient request routes.
notes: Local rehearsal uses the same governed plan, binding, and observation semantics as later production execution.
The route remains explicitly live only after convergence and observation complete.

projectionReadinessVerdict.reason: The local seeded tuple proves expand-migrate-contract, dual-read comparison, and contractive cutover without blocking patient request routes.

executionRows.notes: Schema expansion bound to the exact runtime tuple.
Checkpointed projection backfill and dual-read comparison.
Contractive cutover remains blocked until route readiness is live.

records.title: Local rehearsal remains summary-only while observation is still open
records.summary: Projection rows are present, but the control room keeps the route summary-only until the observation window and probe counts satisfy the declared plan.
notes: This closes the green-job-implies-safety gap by showing a non-blocked but still not-live state.

projectionReadinessVerdict.reason: Projection rows are present, but the control room keeps the route summary-only until the observation window and probe counts satisfy the declared plan.

executionRows.notes: Schema expansion bound to the exact runtime tuple.

records.title: CI preview tuple blocks migration because publication parity is stale
records.summary: Preview remains fail-closed because the current ci-preview publication bundle is already stale and cannot authorize schema or backfill work.
notes: The rehearsal runner still produces a governed blocked settlement instead of falling through to ad hoc SQL or a local bypass.

projectionReadinessVerdict.reason: Preview remains fail-closed because the current ci-preview publication bundle is already stale and cannot authorize schema or backfill work.

executionRows.notes: Schema expansion bound to the exact runtime tuple.

records.title: Integration conflict blocks staff workspace backfill
records.summary: Integration cannot start because the runtime tuple is in conflict and the backfill runner refuses to treat the projection worker as business truth.
notes: Conflict posture remains explicit at the route-family level.

projectionReadinessVerdict.reason: Integration cannot start because the runtime tuple is in conflict and the backfill runner refuses to treat the projection worker as business truth.

records.title: Local contractive cutover fails because rollback proof diverged
records.summary: Cutover remains blocked because rollback evidence no longer matches the bound publication tuple, so the contract phase cannot start.
notes: This closes the rollback-posture gap: green backfill alone is not enough.

projectionReadinessVerdict.reason: Cutover remains blocked because rollback evidence no longer matches the bound publication tuple, so the contract phase cannot start.

records.title: Preprod support replay remains withdrawn until publication recovers
records.summary: Withdrawn publication authority blocks support replay migration entirely; no backfill or route live posture is inferred from historical rows.
notes: Rollforward-only posture remains blocked when publication itself is withdrawn.

projectionReadinessVerdict.reason: Withdrawn publication authority blocks support replay migration entirely; no backfill or route live posture is inferred from historical rows.
